case_title: LEDEAUX, CHARLENE VS CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEDEAUX, CHARLENE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE THE PARTIES ARE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND EXPENSES OF LITIGATION. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27776 ON 5/12/05 EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LEDEAUX, CHARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEDEAUX, CHARLENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE $2,282.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,282.00, CONCURRENTLY WITH THE PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT AT THE LOCATION OF NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE SF, THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY; 1 SOFA COLOR #24, 22-9G. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE
